statement: Stage as first-class shared system — The Stage should be a first-class product component shared by all views, so Kanban, Timeline, Weekly, and Monthly are renderers inside one Stage rather than unrelated screens. — The Stage owns canvas boundaries, view switching, stage movement, week/month navigation, edge scrolling, off-stage dropzones, layout response to islands, transition feedback, and selected/focus context preservation. Kanban and Timeline are different renderers inside the same Stage concept.
